children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, subject to subsection (b), a State may transfer from an apportionment under section 104(b) not to exceed 50 percent of the amount apportioned for the fiscal year to any other apportionment of the State under that section.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Funds that are subject to sections 104(d) and 133(d)(1)(A) shall not be transferred under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: may only come from the portion of those funds that are available for obligation in any area of the State under section 133(h); and

children.label: i
children.text: held a competition in compliance with the guidance issued to carry out section 133(h) and provided sufficient time for applicants to apply;

children.label: ii
children.text: offered to each eligible entity, and provided on request of an eligible entity, technical assistance; and

children.label: iii
children.text: demonstrates that there were not sufficiently suitable applications from eligible entities to use the funds to be transferred.
